result: If I could change the world in one way, it would be to instill a universal sense of empathy in every person. Empathy—the ability to truly understand and share the feelings of others—could bridge divides, reduce conflict, and foster cooperation on a global scale. It would mean people could see beyond their own perspectives, cultures, and biases to recognize the shared humanity in everyone. Wars might be avoided, inequality could be addressed with genuine care, and even small, everyday interactions would be kinder. It’s not a fix for everything, but it’s a foundation that could ripple out to solve so many problems. That’s the change I’d choose.
